entries.title: Inside the Axios supply chain compromise - one RAT to rule them all
entries.summary: Elastic Security Labs analyzes a supply chain compromise of the axios npm package delivering a unified cross-platform RAT

entries.title: Elastic releases detections for the Axios supply chain compromise
entries.summary: Hunting and detection rules for the Elastic-discovered Axios supply chain compromise.

entries.title: Fake Installers to Monero: A Multi-Tool Mining Operation
entries.summary: Elastic Security Labs dissects a long-running operation deploying RATs, cryptominers, and CPA fraud through fake installer lures, tracking its evolution across campaigns and Monero payouts.

entries.title: Elastic Security Labs uncovers BRUSHWORM and BRUSHLOGGER
entries.summary: Elastic Security Labs observed two custom malware components targeting a South Asian financial institution: a modular backdoor with USB-based spreading and a DLL-side-loaded keylogger.

entries.title: Illuminating VoidLink: Technical analysis of the VoidLink rootkit framework
entries.summary: Elastic Security Labs analyzes VoidLink, a sophisticated Linux malware framework that combines traditional Loadable Kernel Modules with eBPF to maintain persistence.

entries.title: Investigating from the Endpoint Across Your Environment with Elastic Security XDR
entries.summary: This article highlights how Elastic Security XDR unifies endpoint protection with multi-domain security analytics to help analysts trace and contain multi-stage attacks across hybrid and cloud environments.

entries.title: Security Automation with Elastic Workflows: From Alert to Response
entries.summary: A practical guide to building intelligent, automated security playbooks with Elastic Workflows.

entries.title: Streamlining the Security Analyst Experience
entries.summary: Alert Triage, Investigation, and Response with Elastic's Agentic Security Operations Platform.

entries.title: Supercharge Your SOC
entries.summary: Detection Engineering in the Era of AI Agents - The New Frontier.

entries.title: Linux & Cloud Detection Engineering - TeamPCP Container Attack Scenario
entries.summary: This publication provides a real-world walkthrough of TeamPCP's multi-stage container compromise, demonstrating how Elastic's D4C surfaces runtime signals across each stage of the attack chain.

entries.title: Linux & Cloud Detection Engineering - Getting Started with Defend for Containers (D4C)
entries.summary: This technical resource provides a comprehensive walkthrough of Elastic’s Defend for Containers (D4C) integration, covering Kubernetes-based deployment, the analysis of BPF-enriched runtime telemetry, and the practical application of policy-driven security controls to monitor and alert on activities within containerized Linux environments.

entries.title: From Invitation to Infection: How SILENTCONNECT Delivers ScreenConnect
entries.summary: SILENTCONNECT is a multi-stage loader that leverages VBScript, in-memory PowerShell execution, and PEB masquerading to silently deploy the ScreenConnect RMM tool.

entries.title: Get started with Elastic Security from your AI agent
entries.summary: Go from zero to a fully populated Elastic Security environment without leaving your IDE, using open source Agent Skills.

entries.title: Managing Elastic Security Detection Rules with Terraform
entries.summary: Learn to define and deploy Elastic Security detection rules and exceptions using the Elastic Stack Terraform Provider vs detection-rules repository DaC capabilities.

entries.title: Patch diff to SYSTEM
entries.summary: Leveraging LLMs and patch diffing, this research details a Use-After-Free vulnerability in Windows DWM, demonstrating a reliable exploit that achieves escalation from low-privileged user permissions to SYSTEM.

entries.title: Hooked on Linux: Rootkit Taxonomy, Hooking Techniques and Tradecraft
entries.summary: In this first part of a two-part series, we explore Linux rootkit taxonomy, trace their evolution from userland shared object hijacking and kernel-space loadable kernel module hooking to modern eBPF- and io_uring-powered techniques.

entries.title: Manage your Elastic security stack as code with the Elastic Stack Terraform provider
entries.summary: From detection rules to AI connectors - the latest Terraform provider releases bring security, observability, and ML capabilities to your infrastructure-as-code workflows.

entries.title: Why 2026 is the Year to Upgrade to an Agentic AI SOC
entries.summary: Agentic AI SOCs differ from copilot-only models by autonomously prioritizing attacks over alerts, executing closed-loop containment, and providing traceable reasoning for every decision, allowing analysts to focus on high-value investigations.

entries.title: Make The Most of Network Firewall Logs with Elastic Security
entries.summary: Make the most of your firewall logs. In Part 1 of our series, learn how to ingest and parse logs from any firewall with Elastic Agent and use the Network Page to visually explore your network traffic for instant insights.

entries.title: Beyond Behaviors: AI-Augmented Detection Engineering with ES|QL COMPLETION
entries.summary: Learn how Elastic's ES|QL COMPLETION command brings LLM reasoning directly into detection rules, enabling detection engineers to build intelligent alert triage without external orchestration.
